title: 3D Jewelry Designer
brief: We’re an established U.S.-based men’s accessories brand looking for a skilled 3D jewelry designer to help bring new pendant and chain designs to life. You’ll be working closely with our industrial designer and from detailed 2D illustrator sketches to create clean, factory-ready 3D models for production with our manufacturing partners. This is an opportunity for ongoing, consistent work with a real brand (not a one-off project) if it’s a good fit. What you’ll do: Create accurate 3D jewelry models (pendants, charms, chains) from 2D sketches Prepare files suitable for factory production and revisions Collaborate with our design team on refinements and iterations Requirements: Experience in 3D jewelry design Proficiency in tools like Rhino, Matrix, or similar Strong attention to detail and production-ready modeling Ability to communicate clearly and hit timelines Nice to have: Experience working directly with factories or manufacturers Understanding of stainless steel / plated jewelry production Please share examples of relevant jewelry-focused 3D work when applying.
